scripts.build:library:fingerprint: dotnet build test/fixtures/Library/Library.csproj -c Debug -p:WasmFingerprintAssets=true && dotnet publish test/fixtures/Library/Library.csproj -c Release -p:WasmFingerprintAssets=true
scripts.build:library:nofingerprint: dotnet build test/fixtures/Library/Library.csproj -c Debug -p:WasmFingerprintAssets=false && dotnet publish test/fixtures/Library/Library.csproj -c Release -p:WasmFingerprintAssets=false
scripts.clean:library: dotnet clean test/fixtures/Library/Library.csproj -c Debug && dotnet clean test/fixtures/Library/Library.csproj -c Release && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('test/fixtures/Library/bin/Release/net10.0/publish', { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.build:sample: dotnet build packages/samples/SampleLibrary/SampleLibrary.csproj -c Debug && dotnet publish packages/samples/SampleLibrary/SampleLibrary.csproj -c Release
scripts.clean:sample: dotnet clean packages/samples/SampleLibrary/SampleLibrary.csproj -c Debug && dotnet clean packages/samples/SampleLibrary/SampleLibrary.csproj -c Release
scripts.build:fixture:all: pnpm build:fixture:browser:vite && pnpm build:fixture:browser:rollup && pnpm build:fixture:browser:rolldown && pnpm build:fixture:browser:webpack && pnpm build:fixture:browser:rspack && pnpm build:fixture:browser:rsbuild && pnpm build:fixture:browser:esbuild && pnpm build:fixture:browser:farm && pnpm build:fixture:browser:bun
scripts.test:fingerprint-enabled: pnpm clean:library && pnpm build:plugin && pnpm build:library:fingerprint && pnpm build:fixture && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:matrix -- --integration --fingerprint=true && pnpm test:matrix -- --e2e --fingerprint=true
scripts.test:fingerprint-disabled: pnpm clean:library && pnpm build:plugin && pnpm build:library:nofingerprint && pnpm build:fixture && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:matrix -- --integration --fingerprint=false && pnpm test:matrix -- --e2e --fingerprint=false
scripts.test:no-build: pnpm clean:library && pnpm build:plugin && pnpm test:matrix -- --integration --fingerprint=none
scripts.test: pnpm test:no-build && pnpm test:fingerprint-enabled && pnpm test:fingerprint-disabled
